Independent financial planning · Rye, East Sussex

A holistic approach to building, protecting and passing on your wealth.

Chambers Financial is an independent advice firm that starts with what truly matters to you — then builds a clear, personal plan to get you there. Transparent advice, no jargon, no products pushed.

Who we help

Advice built around your stage of life

Wherever you are on the journey, the plan is the same in spirit: clarity today, confidence tomorrow.

Entrepreneurs & professionals

Busy building something. We help you turn income into long-term wealth — tax-efficiently — so your money works as hard as you do.

Preparing for retirement

Approaching the finish line of work. We answer the big question — “will I be okay?” — with a clear, numbers-backed plan for the years ahead.

Already in retirement

Enjoying the life you’ve earned. We help your savings last, stay tax-smart, and pass on your legacy exactly as you intend.

What we do

Comprehensive, joined-up financial planning

Every area below is considered together — because the best decisions in one rarely happen in isolation.

01

Retirement planning

Strategies that align with your retirement goals, so your financial future is secure and on your terms.

02

Tax optimisation

Structuring your finances to minimise tax liabilities and keep more of what you’ve earned working for you.

03

Investment management

Expert, independent guidance to help grow and protect your investments through every market.

04

Estate planning

Protecting your legacy through thoughtful, strategic planning — so your wealth passes on the way you intend.

05

Pension review

Evaluating your current pensions to make sure they’re genuinely on track to meet your retirement objectives.

06

Cashflow planning

Mapping your money over a lifetime to give you stability today and confidence about tomorrow.

Our process

Four clear steps, no surprises

Working with an adviser shouldn’t feel opaque. Here’s exactly how it goes from first hello to ongoing partnership.

  1. 1

    Initial meeting

    An in-depth, no-obligation conversation about your objectives, income, assets and attitude to risk. This one’s free.

  2. 2

    Planning

    We research, analyse and build a personalised strategy designed entirely around your goals.

  3. 3

    Action

    We handle the implementation — paperwork, accounts and provider coordination — so you don’t have to.

  4. 4

    Review

    Life changes, markets move. We meet regularly to keep your plan aligned with both.

MC [PLACEHOLDER — adviser photo]

About Chambers Financial

Meet Michael Chambers

Michael has dedicated over a decade to the financial services industry — progressing through postgraduate administration, paraplanning and investment consulting, across independent, restricted, discretionary and offshore firms.

That breadth of experience shaped a simple conviction: that people deserve advice that is genuinely independent, transparent and built around them — which is exactly why he founded Chambers Financial.

  • Honesty & integrity
  • Transparency
  • Independence
  • Expert advice
  • Personal approach
  • Competitive pricing

In their words

What clients say

No testimonials were published on the current site, so these are marked as placeholders rather than invented.

Good to know

Frequently asked questions

Is the first consultation really free?

Yes. The initial meeting is a no-obligation conversation to understand your situation and see whether we’re the right fit for each other — at no cost.

What does “independent” actually mean?

It means our advice spans the whole of the market and isn’t tied to any particular provider or product. Recommendations are based solely on what’s right for you.

Are you regulated?

Yes. Chambers Financial Ltd is an Appointed Representative of ValidPath Limited, which is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. Our FCA reference is 1016681.

Do I need a lot of money to work with you?

No. We work with people at different stages — from professionals building wealth to those already in retirement — with competitive, transparent pricing. [PLACEHOLDER — confirm any minimum or fee structure.]

Where are you based and can we meet remotely?

We’re based at 12 Lea Avenue, Rye, East Sussex. [PLACEHOLDER — confirm remote / video meeting availability.]

Let’s start with a conversation

The best financial plans begin with a simple chat about what matters to you. Book your free consultation — there’s no obligation, and no jargon.
